title: regalia newmaniana
intro: Regalia newmaniana, also known as the Australian holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to eastern Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Regalia newmaniana is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The leaves of the plant can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which can be consumed to reap the plant's medicinal benefits.
